programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: It's the late 1800s and a marshal must stop a volatile and growing conflict between homesteaders and cattle drivers in his small town on the Kansas frontier.

programme.title: The Sundowners
programme.desc: When a dispute over grazing rights to a fertile canyon leads to cattle rustling, the rustling ignites a range war, turning two brothers against one another. Will both brothers survive the deadly conflict between them?

programme.title: Yuma
programme.desc: When a tough, veteran United States marshal is sent to clean up a down-and-dirty Western town, he faces a scheme to remove his authority and ruin his reputation.

programme.title: Handcrafted America
programme.desc: Handcrafted America - Stained Glass, Baseballs, Footballs, and Jewelry Boxes: Host Jill Wagner travels the country on a quest to find talented craftsmen who still make incredible items by hand. Her first stop is St. Paul, Minnesota, where she meets Josephine Geiger, an artisan who creates stained-glass window panels that look like impressionistic landscapes. Next, Jill heads to Glen Rock, New Jersey, to visit Paul Cunningham, a leatherworker who converted his love of sports into a unique business making vintage baseball and footballs from alligator, ostrich, and other unusual leathers. Finally, in Mukwanago, Wisconsin, Jill works alongside Bob Dickey, a woodworker who demonstrates how to make exquisite, inlaid jewelry boxes.

programme.title: Handcrafted America
programme.desc: Handcrafted America - Reclaimed Wood Guitars, Silver Teapots, Infinity Bookshelf: Host Jill Wagner travels the country on a quest to find talented craftsmen who still make incredible items by hand. Down in Charleston, South Carolina, Kaminer Haislip crafts sleek, modern teapots using silver and exotic woods. Her work is exhibited in museums the world over. Detroit, Michigan, rocks again, thanks to Mark Wallace. His company reclaims wood from dilapidated, historic buildings in the city and turns them into amazing electric guitars. And in Monroe, Georgia, Eric McKenna left a desk job to follow his dream of woodworking and now bends and joins wood to create his infinity shaped bookcase.

programme.title: Handcrafted America
programme.desc: Handcrafted America - Wristwatches, Cowboy Whips, Luminarias: Host Jill Wagner travels the country on a quest to find talented craftsmen who still make incredible items by hand. In Edgewater, Maryland, former boat maker, Allen Cady, uses his woodworking skills to transform a find of rare heart of pine lumber into translucent luminarias. Philadelphia is home to watch maker Roland Murphy who doesn't just assemble watches from acquired parts, but is actually making more than 90% of the pieces himself. Last stop is Otis Orchards, Washington where Jill gets crackin' with Joe Strain who makes bullwhips used around the world and even in popular movies like Indiana Jones.

programme.title: Into The Wild Frontier
programme.desc: Into The Wild Frontier - John Coffee Hays: A Texas Legend: A Tennessee native, John Coffee Hays heads to the frontier of Texas in the 1830s and signs on as an early member of the Texas Rangers. In 1844, Hays becomes a legend when he leads a small band of rangers in a desperate fight with the Comanche.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A veteran Detective Chief Inspector and his Sergeant investigate murders around the community of Midsomer. Someone puts Barnaby in the frame in the murders of two rival photographers.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A veteran Detective Chief Inspector and his Sergeant investigate murders around the community of Midsomer. A film about the French Revolution is made in Midsomer.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - Winning Through Intimidation: Despite his astonishing disadvantage, Yugi boldly provokes Panik - "I'll finish you in three turns." Is Yugi bluffing, or does he have the advantage in this battle of wits?

programme.title: Shaq's Garage
programme.desc: Shaq's Garage - Raiders of the Lost Jewel / In Gronk We Trust: Professor Woodraven enlists the help of the Paq to find the famed Jewel of Kaheelee hidden somewhere in the wilds outside of Orlanta. Himari, Fleming, and Klaus jump at the chance, but not all is as it seems. When the Professor turns out to be an impostor, the Paw must race to save the precious jewel from the thief. / Shaq hosts a charity basketball game and tasks each member of the Paq with picking up items and helping set up for the event. Gronk begs Shaq to let him pick up the most important item, the winning trophy, and Shaq agrees. The rest of the Paq thinks it's a bad idea, but Gronk aims to prove them wrong. After getting distracted multiple times, Gronk has to dig deep to prove that Shaq's trust in his wasn't a mistake.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage
programme.desc: Shaq's Garage - The Donut Caper / Klaus' Lie: Marlowe Sternwood, the Girl Fun Group Troop Leader, asks the Paq to help find the missing delivery of the annual assorted donut sale's donuts. Biggie D, Fleming, and Tibbs race out to find out what happened with the missing truck. Quickly they discover the evil Keeter Reebus is behind it and they have to locate the missing shipment before time runs out / Klaus tells Shaq that he needs maintenance to get out of volunteering on the first day of the Boys and Girls Club Rolling Wood Derby so he can race Niccolo Tessio. After winning, he thinks he's in the clear and can make the derby the next day. When Niccolo challenges him to yet another race, Klaus has to decided what's more important: beating Niccolo or fulfilling his promise to Shaq.

programme.title: Bakugan Geogan Rising
programme.desc: Bakugan Geogan Rising - The Taste of Memories / Virtual Brawl: When Ajit mentions that one of his earliest memories is eating lentil curry, the other ABs decide to surprise him by making some. / Benton Dusk is helping the AB train for the Judgement Battle with his new virtual reality simulator.

programme.title: Bakugan Geogan Rising

programme.desc: Super Mario Bros 3 - Reign Storm: Princess Toadstool and Toad go to Hawaii for a vacation while leaving the Mario Bros. in charge of the Mushroom Kingdom. / King Koopa and Kooky plan to go to the place where the Mario Bros. have gone into the Mushroom Kingdom by using a time travel device.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - Arena of Lost Souls, Part 1: Bandit Keith's gang kidnaps Joey to a secret cave with a graveyard playing field. As Yugi and friends search for him, Joey faces Bandit Keith's zombie monsters which become stronger as they return from the grave!

programme.title: Shaq's Garage

After filling up Queenie's loader, everyone heads to the dump a storm bursts overhead. When lighting strikes the trash, it unleashes a monster that leaves Himari alone to defeat / Prince Jaffa arrives in Orlanta from Kinshasa, Africa for an official visit and stays at Shaq's house. Despite strict orders by Prince Jaffa's chaperone to not leave the garage after a long day of Princely duties, Himari convinces Prince Jaffa to sneak out with her and Fleming to experience what it's like being a normal teenager.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: At 12 months, babies can identify specific sounds, and they re also starting to match the sounds they hear with the objects that make them. Meet the Orchestra -- First Instruments presents your little "maestro" with a playful introduction to the sights and sounds of a real orchestra -- from the clashing of cymbals to the purring of the cello and everything in between!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby's Favorite Places: First Words Around Town
programme.desc: As babies turn one year old, they continue to develop their communication skills. Meanwhile, with you as their guide, they also begin to explore the world beyond their front door. Baby's Favorite Places presents them with a playful introduction to 20 words for the names of familiar locations from the market, to the library, to the local park.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As little ones become better acquainted with the world, they grow curious about animals of all kinds, beyond just the family pet. And as their communication skills continue to develop, they enjoy imitating animal sounds as well. Baby Noah Animal Expedition takes your little explorer across the globe to meet animals -- two-by-two -- from the savannah, the rainforest and tropics, the Outback, the ocean and the Polar Regions.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As babies continue to explore the world around them, they soon encounter many creatures, both large and small, that are extremely intriguing. Whether furry or feathered, winged or wiggly, bumpy or smooth, each holds a special fascination. Neighborhood Animals exposes little ones to animals most likely to be found close to home or in easily recognized environments.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby Wordsworth: First Words Around the House
programme.desc: As their communication skills continue to develop, little ones begin to recognize common words and may point to objects or pictures when these items are named. Baby Wordsworth playfully taps into your little one's natural curiosity and introduces 30 words from around the home -- both spoken and in sign language. This engaging program presents little ones with familiar objects in the kitchen, playroom, yard and more -- from the living room window to their favorite teddy bear.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Within a baby's first year of life, new experiences can transform what might otherwise seem to be ordinary events into exciting opportunities for imaginative play. Baby Neptune exposes little ones to the wonders of water in their world -- whether they're stomping in the rain, splashing in the bathtub, playing "catch me if you can" with the tide on the beach, or "meeting" the fascinating creatures that live in rivers, lakes and oceans.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Baby Mozart is an introduction to Mozart's beautiful music, which has been proven to have positive affects on people of all ages, especially babies. Images of brightly colored toys and known objects aid in the audio presentation of child-friendly arrangements and sound effects.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Take your little explorer on an exotic musical expedition to meet wild animals from across the globe. Journey to the jungle, savannah, desert and forest.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby Da Vinci: From Head to Toe
programme.desc: From the day their eyes open, babies begin to observe new things around the world and about themselves. Baby Da Vinci From Head to Toe presents them with a playful and interactive introduction to the human body in three languages -- English, Spanish, and French. With a whimsical blend of adorable puppets, real children and animals and famous works of art, this captivating program also features upbeat classical music.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Lullaby Time: Soothing Sounds for Baby
programme.desc: One of the greatest joys you'll ever experience is bonding with your baby during those calm, quiet moments. Lullaby Time: Soothing Sounds for Baby provides comforting sights and sounds as you relax and share this precious downtime.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Join our playful puppet host, Bard the Dragon, on a fun-filled adventure using everyday words such as flower, cat, and moon, and beautiful scenery from nature. World Of Words lets you and your little one share the excitement of discovering new words together!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.sub-title: Scoop The Disco Digger / Bob The Farmer
programme.desc: Bob and the gang replace some burst pipes under the main road. / Bob has volunteered to look after the farm.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.sub-title: Spud's Statue / Pilchard and the Field Mice
programme.desc: Bob is building a pavilion in the park. / Mr Ellis needs Bob to replace an old rotten beam in his cottage.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: A fierce storm is forecast for Bobsville. / It's Mr and Mrs Bentley's twenty fifth wedding anniversary.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Blueberry ordered some Zippy Gro daisy seeds and planted them in her garden. She is surprised that they've sprouted in less than a day despite their descriptive moniker. Strawberry comes by to admire them and Blueberry is reminded that the new cookbook Strawberry ordered has arrived. Strawberry is excited to try out the new corn muffin recipe, as its level of difficulty will be a challenge for her. Strawberry follows the muffin recipe, mixes the ingredients, and double checks it.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry and Orange are dangling their legs in the stream when something tickles Orange's foot. She is sent squealing from the water, certain an eel is after her. Strawberry good-naturedly chuckles at her antics. But Orange gets her dander up and wades into the water to face her "attacker." When she looks down into the water, gazing up at her is the cutest, most adorable, puffy-cheeked fish she's ever seen. It's love at first sight. Orange has to take him home.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: While at Orange's general store to pick up a package, Berrykin Bloom chats with Orange about the pogostick he gave her to help her reach the upper shelves. She is very appreciative. He ends up getting a package of special berry seeds he ordered, not the vacation magazine Orange thought he came for. He explains how the seeds were a better purchase because of all the benefits to the Berryworks but now he can no longer afford a vacation.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: All of Berry Bitty City is gathered around to watch the last snowberrykin melt. As the last bit of snow forms a puddle, a cheer goes up, spring is here! It's now time for the annual BerryFest. But with Princess Berrykin out of town on business, who will be the BerryFest Princess and preside over the festival?! Everyone is abuzz with how to go about choosing the Princess and what her duties will be. Postmaster Bee declares the only fair way to go about it is to hold an election. Everyone agrees.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: At the girls' campout, Sour launches into a whopper of a yarn about the adventures she and Sweet had in the "Berry Deep Dark Forest." She tries to get Sweet to participate in spinning the tale, but Sour's over-the-top performance leaves Sweet behind. Toward the end, Sour graciously changes the story to pull Sweet into it, giving Sweet the opportunity to toss in an ad lib that makes a nice topper to Sour's story.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: While sipping cider in Strawberry's café, the girls muse about how they cannot wait for winter to arrive. They list the various traditions they love about the season but the one they all agree on is the Glimmerberry Ball. Strawberry mentions that she doesn't think the café can hold the party this year because of how the town has grown. The girls decide to split up and search for a new location.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry is really touched when her girlfriends and the Berrykins volunteer to help her with the construction of her new marketplace, so when the girls suggest they take charge of designing Strawberry's dream-bedroom to go on the second story, of course Strawberry agrees. While construction is going on, the girls each show Strawberry their individual ideas for the bedroom.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Blueberry ordered some Zippy Gro daisy seeds and planted them in her garden. She is surprised that they've sprouted in less than a day despite their descriptive moniker. Strawberry comes by to admire them and Blueberry is reminded that the new cookbook Strawberry ordered has arrived. Strawberry is excited to try out the new corn muffin recipe, as its level of difficulty will be a challenge for her. Strawberry follows the muffin recipe, mixes the ingredients, and double checks it.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.sub-title: The Berry Best You Can Bee
programme.desc: Strawberry is at Orange's store to mail a birthday card to a friend in Big Bitty City. Just after she drops the card into the mail slot, an ill postal carrier bee sneezes sending envelopes and post cards flying in all directions. The two girls help Jadeybug, a postal clerk, and Postmaster Bee gather up the strewn letters and the ill bee gets sent home from work.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry opens her front door to a throng of Berrykins all cheering for the new BerryFest Princess. She is appreciative of their admiration but unsure of exactly what her duties entail. In response the Berrykins bombard her with her duties - major to miniscule. One Berrykin sums it up by telling her she's responsible for presiding over all the activities of the BerryFest to make it the best.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.sub-title: When the Berry Fairy Came to Stay
programme.desc: Out gathering berries one day, Strawberry & her pets find a tiny fairy among the berry vines. Realizing that Strawberry is a very kind & caring person, the little fairy decides to take advantage of the kid's good nature.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry's friend Coco Calypso lives on Seaberry Beach with her pet, Papaya Parrot, and a band of fun-loving monkeys.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: As Strawberry & Friends visit a Career Fair, they ponder their own futures. They all have thoughts on the jobs they would like: teacher, firefighter, doctor, etc.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry and her friends love to dance - and the Peculiar Purple Pieman of Porcupine Peak is taking advantage of that!

programme.title: HappyKids
programme.desc: HappyKids

programme.title: HappyKids
programme.desc: HappyKids

programme.title: Dance Puppy Dance
programme.desc: When a simple tune Cherry composes goes viral on the Berryweb, Cherry quickly gets fed up with everyone listening to this song, everywhere, all the time. She goes to comic lengths to get some peace so she can compose the song she's suppose to write for the Queen of Berryvania.

programme.title: Playback
programme.desc: Ghost Girl, a bounty hunter who works for SOL Technologies, holds an interview with two reporters recounting all the events that have transpired concerning the evil Knights of Hanoi and the mysterious Playmaker.

programme.title: HappyKids
programme.desc: HappyKids

programme.title: An Invitation
programme.desc: Ghost Girl challenges Yusaku to a Speed Duel with some heavy stakes. If she wins, she gets to capture Ai. If Yusaku wins, he gets a window into SOL's server to learn more about the incident that still haunts him.

programme.title: Blippi The Musical
programme.desc: Blippi The Musical brings the lively Blippi from the screen to the stage in an exciting live show. Recorded in Nashville, TN, the performance features 14 songs, including favorites like "Do the Blippi Dance," "Brush Brush Your Teeth," and "Monster Truck." Your Blippi fan will enjoy learning about the world while singing and dancing along with this special show. There's so much to explore—it'll make you want to sing and shout!

programme.title: Room at the Top
programme.desc: Strawberry is really touched when her girlfriends and the Berrykins volunteer to help her with the construction of her new marketplace, so when the girls suggest they take charge of designing Strawberry's dream-bedroom to go on the second story, of course Strawberry agrees. While construction is going on, the girls each show Strawberry their individual ideas for the bedroom. Grateful for the support and not wanting to dampen anyone's enthusiasm, Strawberry tells each of them yes (actually, more like not-no).

programme.title: Starlight, Star Bright
programme.desc: With time running out before the Grand Opening celebration for the new Marketplace, Strawberry's friends get the idea to invite her favorite singer, superstar CHERRY JAM, to be the guest singer. The girls are blown away when their berryjuice cell phone gets a text message that Cherry accepts their invitation! Strawberry is touched by their surprise, but reminds them that now the town and Marketplace really have to shine! The girls and Berrykins rush to turn the Marketplace Café into a suitable performance area for a big star like Cherry Jam.

programme.title: Blippi's Alphabet and Transportation Adventures
programme.desc: Join Blippi on a series of exciting educational journeys where he uncovers the Case of the Missing ABCs, explores the charming Ranch at the Pier, and delves into London's rich transportation history at both the Transport Museum and the RAF Museum. From solving puzzles and meeting farm animals to discovering vintage buses and historic airplanes, Blippi makes learning an adventure filled with curiosity and fun.

programme.title: Blippi's Fun and Colorful Exploration
programme.desc: Get ready for a vibrant and entertaining escapade with Blippi as he dives into a world of colors at Billy Beez, creates a whimsical pizza in the kitchen, transforms into a playful pirate on a treasure hunt, and explores the fascinating world of dinosaurs at the Santa Barbara Museum of Natural History. Each adventure is packed with laughter, creativity, and educational moments, making learning a joyful experience for kids.

programme.title: Leo, The Wildlife Ranger
programme.desc: The Junior Rangers invent a new mechanical leg for a Japanese Spider Crab.

programme.title: Leo, The Wildlife Ranger

programme.title: The Snowball Effect
programme.desc: Laval and Li'Ella's relationship grows as he gives her a tour of the Lion City. But distracted, he misses a key battle against the Hunters. Tormak joins the fight and saves the day. But the Lion King Lagravis is captured and brought to the Ice Fort. Who will lead the Lions now?!?

programme.title: The Final Game
programme.desc: With the fate of the dragon horns hanging in the balance, the Ninja must rally to defend them from those who seek their power.

programme.title: Elements of Betrayal
programme.desc: The Ninja clash with the notorious Forbidden Five in a fierce showdown, but the arrival of unexpected allies shifts the momentum.

programme.title: Prophecy Of The Green Ninja, Greatest Battles
programme.desc: So the final puzzle forces ninja to question the true meaning of the Green Ninja Prophecy. Solving the puzzles releases a new peril for the Ninja to face. Will memories of their greatest victories be enough to defeat it?

programme.title: The Power and the Peril!
programme.desc: Rock star mathematician Ian Malcolm returns to Isla Nublar and helps Claire, Owen and Hudson deal with strange power surges all over Jurassic World.

programme.title: Fistful of Doppelgangers
programme.desc: The Candy Realm is under siege, and the dream chasers are tasked with saving its sugary inhabitants. As they orchestrate a mass evacuation, Mateo and Astrid sneak into the Midnight Raven.

programme.title: Irrational Treasure
programme.desc: The elusive Eye of Confusion has been located, but the dream chasers are not alone in their pursuit. With the Never Witch's doppelgangers on their heels, the team embarks on a frantic treasure hunt.

programme.title: Mission Inplausible
programme.desc: As the Eye of Confusion's power threatens to unravel reality, Logan and Astrid are forced to confront their deepest fears in the Dream Forge.

programme.title: Music “Battle of the Stars”
programme.desc: Nova pulls off a series of pranks, leaving her friends scrambling and laughing. However, things take a dark turn when one of her pranks goes awry and sends the group into a terrifying situation.

programme.title: The Royal Blacksmiths
programme.desc: The four ninja go undercover as a dance troupe and enter a talent contest in their quest to win “The Blade Cup” where one of the fang blades is hidden.

programme.title: Marvel Superheroes
programme.desc: Loki arrives at Avengers Tower declaring he wants to be an Avenger. Our heroes are skeptical, but Iron Man decides to make Loki an ”Avenger In Training”. It's a great plan until Thanos arrives on Earth looking for Loki

programme.title: The Book Of Total Badness
programme.desc: The NEXO-Knights must fight Jestro's Monsters of Destruction which are attacking all over the Kingdom. But Merlok smells a trap…is he right? In a dark, destroyed part of the kingdom, Jestro arrives at the ruins of a HUGE castle. The Book of Monsters knows this place: the great evil wizard Monstrux lived here. The Book sniffs out some powerful magic in the ruins: “The Book of Destruction.” With this, The Book tells Jestro they can destroy the NEXO-Knights and then attack the King's Castle and cause massive destruction. Jestro creates destructive monsters and sends them all over the realm, so the Knights must separate and fight single combats all over the place. The Knights lose these battles (lesson: they have to work as a team!) And, just when the Knights are scattered across the Kingdom, Jestro attacks the King's Castle! It looks like all is lost. When Aaron, who has escaped, returns to see Jestro's attack, he realizes he must gather his fellow Knights. Merlok says it's very dangerous, but Aaron says he must take the risk to gather the Knights and save Knighton.

programme.title: Gorilla's Gone Wild
programme.desc: Cragger angers the Gorilla tribe and they march to the Crocodile Swamp to teach him a lesson. But the Gorilla Mechs are not fit for the swampy water and the Lions and Eagles must come to the rescue. The only problem is that the Lions don't like water ... at all!

programme.title: The Haunted and the Hunted!
programme.desc: Something mysterious lurking the jungle wrecks a construction site, and Hudson is convinced a ghost is responsible - but it might be something even more surprising.

programme.title: The Snowball Effect
programme.desc: Laval and Li'Ella's relationship grows as he gives her a tour of the Lion City. But distracted, he misses a key battle against the Hunters. Tormak joins the fight and saves the day. But the Lion King Lagravis is captured and brought to the Ice Fort. Who will lead the Lions now?!?

programme.title: Elements of Betrayal

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: After joining a scientific expedition to investigate a Kabuto fossil, Ash and friends soon find themselves facing a series of natural disasters!

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Another Water-type specialist challenges Misty to a battle and offers some advice: she thinks Misty's Psyduck might be ready to evolve!

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Our heroes meet a very busy Nurse Joy who has to do some serious island-hopping to take care of all the Pokémon in the area! Can they help protect her from Team Rocket?

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: In Ash's second challenge against the Orange Crew, he must climb a mountain, build a bobsled, and win a sled race! Do his Pokémon have what it takes to help him through these obstacles?

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Our heroes' explorations take them to the seven Grapefruit Islands, where they learn that the islands' famous fruit has been disappearing! Ash, Misty, and Tracey set out to catch whoever's responsible.

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: When divers recover an ancient Orange League Championship trophy, our heroes head straight for the art museum where it's on display to check it out! Unfortunately, Team Rocket has beaten them to the punch…

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: When Team Rocket crashes on an island, Meowth is the center of attention when the locals mistake him for the "Great Meowth of Bounty," a powerful creature spoken of in prophecy. What will happen when they learn the truth?

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Misty is not pleased when our heroes land on an island swarming with Bug-type Pokémon, though Ash and Tracey are having a blast. When they find an injured Scyther, can Misty overcome her disgust and help out?

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: When Ash and friends find a wonderful island brimming with many kinds of fruit trees, they decide to take a break and enjoy the bounty! Of course, Team Rocket has other ideas…

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Our heroes meet a couple of Trainers who don't seem to get along at all, even though their Nidoran are obviously smitten with each other. Misty is determined to solve this romantic challenge!

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: Slogging through a thunderstorm, our heroes notice a group of Magnemite soaking up electricity from the lightning bolts. When they finally get into town to rest, there's a blackout! Can the Magnemite help?

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: In Trovitopolis City, Ash and friends hear stories about some kind of monster that's been scaring everyone—and when the ground cracks open and dumps them in the sewer, it seems they might meet this monster face to face!

programme.title: Pokémon
programme.desc: After Misty dives into a whirlpool to rescue a girl, she learns that the girl's brother, Rudy, has a giant crush on her. Things get more complicated when it turns out he's also the Gym Leader Ash must challenge next!

programme.title: Splash & Bubbles

programme.title: Sing Along With Tobee
programme.desc: Tobee is learning how to tell time in school and it's hard! Clocks have hands that point to different numbers! So Caitie tries to help Tobee by showing him a clock, and by singing a song called "Hickory Dickory Dock." It'll help Tobee practice telling time. After the song, Tobee is telling time in no time. Ba-da-bum! / Tobee is playing Guess That Animal Sound with Caitie. Caitie is really good at guessing! She even knows a song about animals sounds! It's called "Walking in the Jungle." After they learn a bunch of new animal sounds, Caitie has Tobee guess which animal sounds she's making. Can you guess, too? (S3 E05)

programme.title: Sing Along With Tobee

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: David is embarrassed by a childhood issue that resurfaces, and when Patrick is so understanding, it only makes David spiral further. Alexis helps Moira join social media, and while at first resistant, once she gets the hang of it, Moira can't seem to get enough.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: After Johnny is rejected for a bank loan, he and Moira resolve to pursue Bob as an investor for the new motel. programme.title: Schitt's Creek

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Alexis plans a local premiere for the Crows movie and everyone in town wants to make an appearance on the red carpet. programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: The video from the Crows premiere goes viral, thrusting Moira back in the public eye and flooding Alexis with press. programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira and David sample wine at Herb Ertlinger's vineyard and accidentally get a bit tipsy. programme.title: Eric O Shea
programme.desc: Eric O'Shea has been active in the comedy business for 25 years. He has performed in L.A. with Betty White at the Creative Emmy Awards and has appeared on America's Got Talent TV Show. Every year since 1997, Eric has performed an average of 70 shows a year, and has received 7 nominations as the “National College Comedian of the Year”

programme.title: Jonnie W: Not My Cup of Tea
programme.desc: Jonnie W addresses the Tennessee-born stereotype. Whether or not he matches up to it, his voiced inner monologue is sure to leave you on his side when it comes to new country radio, double decker grave plots, and the difference between fish and beef.

programme.title: Danny Johnson
programme.desc: Danny Johnson's hilarious, clean stand-up has entertained audiences in comedy clubs, corporate events, and churches nationwide. Often called a cross between Jerry Seinfeld and Kevin James Danny's show is relatable, engaging, and always hilarious. Danny has starred in numerous TV commercials, Comedy Central's Laugh Riots, Florida's Funniest Comedian semi-finalist, Winner-Carnival Cruise line Comedy Challenge, Finalist in Search for the One Christian Comedy contest, and has had the pleasure of sharing the stage with Chris Rock, Bob Saget, Billy Gardell, Richard Lewis, and a variety of others. Danny has led a dual track career for over a decade achieving success in both corporate America and as a comedian. Blending his unique skill sets led to him publishing his first book, "You Stink and They Know It! A practical guide to nailing your next job interview."

programme.title: Cleto Rodriguez
programme.desc: Rodriguez connects with audiences by relating everyday life experiences. Anything and everything is fair game, from marriage mishaps to the challenges of dieting. His comedy is high-energy, observational and hilarious with a brilliant Latino twist.

programme.title: Chad Thornsberry
programme.desc: Chad Thornsberry was born in St. Louis, MO. From an early age he learned his family was blessed, and blessed him with humor, quick wit, and a love of storytelling. Chad's unique comedic perspective awards audience the opportunity to laugh at the common occurrences in everyday life. Often referred to as a great writer, his straightforward style allows audiences to laugh with him and at him as they find the humor in themselves. With reflections on growing up in a trailer park and observations as an English teacher, Chad's satiric insights look at the pitfalls that make us human. With smart humor and a conversational style, Chad has delighted audiences from the trailer park, throughout the Midwest, and from coast to coast.

programme.title: Maher Matta
programme.desc: Born in Lebanon and raised in the American South, Maher Matta jokes about flying while Arab, using Rogaine at fifteen, and working as a state trooper.

programme.title: Bob Zany
programme.sub-title: I Think I Handled That Well
programme.desc: He simply reaches into a bottomless grab bag of jokes, so smooth and effortless that it would be easy to overlook just how much talent and skill is behind the process'"

programme.title: Bengt Washburn
programme.desc: Bengt Washburn is an Aquarius with Hazel eyes who prefers boxer briefs, solid deodorants, and Crest toothpaste. He is 5'9" tall, weighs about 149 pounds and can bench 150 pounds three times without a spotter. He has a vertical leap of 16 inches. 8 years a

programme.title: Frances Dilorenzo
programme.desc: Frances takes the stage full of energy and ready for fun. Frances does one thing you don't see many female comics do…physical humor, and she delivers it with every silly bone in her body. Her material stems from her life, but she draws both men and women into her world with such a connection, it feels like she is personalizing every joke. In addition to touring nationally, Frances Dilorinzo's credits include appearances on Nick Mom Night Out – Nickelodeon, Last Comic Standing - NBC, Comics Unleashed -ABC, Secret Life of a Soccer Mom -TLC, Real Housewives of Orange County – Bravo, as well as, performing for our troops around the world.

programme.title: Murderers and Their Mothers: Howe

Once the apple of his mother's eye, she tried in vain to intervene as her son transformed into a hateful monster. One who would ultimately take her life in a frenzied, violent stabbing, leaving her to bleed to death on her bedroom floor.

Her ex-partner, Brad Callaghan, says that she missed a scheduled pick up of their young son and that he is concerned for her well-being.

programme.title: Louis Armstrong
programme.desc: Following a highly successful small-group jazz concert at New York Town Hall on May 17, 1947, Armstrong's manager Joe Glaser dissolved the Armstrong big band on August 13, 1947 and established a six-piece small group. This group was called the All Stars, and in 1964 Louis Armstrong recorded his biggest-selling record, Hello, Dolly! He made assorted television appearances, especially in the 1950s and 1960s – the recorded film was a TV Show in Australia when Armstrong was at the peak of his career. Armstrong kept up his busy tour schedule until a few years before his death in 1971. He also toured Africa, Europe, and Asia under sponsorship of the US State Department with great success, earning the nickname ‘Ambassador Satch'.

programme.title: George Shearing & Neil Swanson
programme.sub-title: George Shearing Duo feat. Neil Swainson
programme.desc: British pianist George Shearing enjoyed an international reputation as an instrumentalist, arranger, and composer. Equally at home on the classical concert stage as in jazz clubs, he was recognized for his inventive, orchestrated jazz. In this live recording from the Munich Philharmonie, Shearing played in a duo format with Canadian double bassist Neil Swainson. The repertoire consisted of a selection of compositions by Shearing himself, among them ‘Lullaby Of Birdland', which is a standard in jazz repertoire.

programme.title: Carla Bley, Steve Swallow, Wayne Krantz & Victor Lewis
programme.sub-title: Carla Bley Sextet live at Estival Lugano 1986
programme.desc: Since 1977, Estival is a summer jazz festival in Switzerland, Lugano. Estival offers a thrilling and particularly surprising line-up that explores the rich world of contemporary music whilst promoting the understanding of different cultures, tolerance, and co-existence. Discover the special bond between pianist Carla Bley and bassist Steve Swallow. The two have performed in the same bands since the '60s and have been romantic partners for more than two decades. Watching them perform is the definition of musical telepathy. Together with musicians Wayne Krantz, Victor Lewis, Larry Willis, and Don Alias, they form an amazing sextet at Estival in 1986.

programme.title: Eliane Elias
programme.desc: There's no question about it: with a Grammy for Best Latin Jazz Album for her recording ‘Made In Brazil', seven previous Grammy nominations, four ‘Gold Disc Awards', and three ‘Best Vocal Album Awards' in Japan, Eliane Elias has taken her place in the pantheon of music giants. In her projects, Elias wears many hats: she serves as producer, composer, lyricist, arranger, pianist, and vocalist. In this concert broadcast, recorded live at the Philharmonie in Munich, Elias shows her distinctive and immediately recognizable musical style, which blends her Brazilian samba roots and her sensuous, alluring voice with her impressive instrumental bebop, jazz, classical, and compositional skills. She is an artist beyond category, and in this concert she performs with Jay Randall Anderson (bass) and Adam Nussbaum (drums).

programme.title: Cannonball Adderley
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Thelonious Monk, Charlie Rouse, Ben Riley & Larry Gales
programme.desc: The idiosyncratic pianist and composer Thelonious Monk (1917-1982) is one of the all-time greats of jazz. His music went largely misunderstood for the first 15 years of his career, after which he was rightly hailed as a genius, and received credit as a founding father of bebop. Several concerts from his 1966 European tour were recorded for television, featuring his quartet of Charles Rouse (tenor saxophone), Lawrence Gales (bass) and Benjamin Riley (drums). His quartet performed Epistrophy, 'Round Midnight, and Lulu's Back in Town in Warsaw for Polish television on April 4, 1966. On April 17, the same quartet performed a short set in Copenhagen for Danish television, featuring Lulu's Back in Town, Don't Blame Me, and Epistrophy.

programme.title: Chucho Valdés, Concha Buika, Rodney Barreto & Dreiser Durruthy Bombale
programme.desc: ‘Jazz a Vienne' is one of the world's most prestigious jazz festivals. Ever since 1981 it has attracted leading jazz artists, with many of them playing return engagements. Unsurprisingly, the festival's 2013 edition did not fall short of expectations: the lineup was filled with the biggest names in music. Among them were Chucho Valdes and his Afro-Cuban Messengers, the prime example of Latin-inspired jazz music. Together with vocalists Concha Buika and Dreiser Durruthy Bombale, Rodney Barreto on drums, Gaston Joya on double bass, Yaroldy Abreu Robles on congas, and Reinaldo Melian Alvarez on trumpet, the legendary pianist brings the streets of Havana to the festival's stage.

programme.title: Václav Luks & Collegium 1704
programme.desc: J. S. Bach's six Brandenburg Concerto's belong to his best-known works. The composer wrote these concertos between 1711 and 1720 and dedicated them in 1721 to Christian Ludwig, Margrave of Brandenburg. In celebration of the pieces' 300th anniversary, Czech harpsichordist and conductor Václav Luks and the renowned Baroque ensemble Collegium 1704 recorded all six Brandenburg Concertos on historical instruments in 2021. The concertos are based on the Italian concerto grosso form, in which a group of solo instruments is set against a large ensemble. Bach's Brandenburg Concertos feature remarkable combinations of solo instruments and virtuoso solos. This performance was recorded at the Hall of Mirrors in the Köthen Castle, Germany.

programme.title: Herbert Blomstedt & Gewandhausorchester Leipzig
programme.sub-title: Symphonies in D by Mozart and Voríšek
programme.desc: Conductor Herbert Blomstedt and the Gewandhausorchester take us on a musical journey to the Czech Republic in this 2020 concert from Leipzig's Gewandhaus. The program opens with Bohemian composer Jan Václav Hugo Voríšek's Symphony in D major, Op. 23 (1821). Although the composition – Voríšek's only symphony – was never performed during the composer's lifetime, it has become one of his most-performed works today. Also on the program is Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart's Symphony No. 38 in D major, K. 504. This work, which premiered while Mozart was visiting Prague in 1787, is often referred to as the ‘Prague Symphony'.

programme.title: Seong-Jin Cho
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Ivan Fischer, Budapest Festival Orchestra & Richard Goode
programme.sub-title: Beethoven - Symphonies and Piano Concerto No. 4
programme.desc: Iván Fischer leads his Budapest Festival Orchestra (BFO) in a concert program dedicated to the music of Ludwig van Beethoven. The program opens with the composer's Symphony No. 1 in C major, Op. 21. Afterward, Fischer conducts Beethoven's Piano Concerto No. 4 in G major, Op. 58, in which Richard Goode features as the soloist. The acclaimed American pianist (1943) is known for his interpretations of the Beethoven repertoire. Goode recorded all five Beethoven piano concertos with the BFO and Fischer, earning him exceptional critical acclaim and a Grammy Award nomination. As an encore, Goode performs the Sarabande from J. S. Bach's Partita in B-flat major, BWV 825. The program closes with Beethoven's famous Symphony No. 5 in C minor, Op. 67. This performance was recorded at the Béla Bartók National Concert Hall in Budapest, Hungary, on January 29, 2017.

programme.title: Les Dissonances
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Mademoiselle Karen, Jakob Munch, Danish National Symphony Orchestra & Emma Smith
programme.desc: One night only! Welcome to the spectacular and decadent world of The Babylon Hotel, where music pours out of every crevice like bubbling champagne. In this concert, the upper class meets the underworld in a melting pot of euphoria and extravagance, nostalgia and pleasure with a carefree sinfulness only seen in the exuberant nightlife of the 1920s around the world. The concert features iconic music from movies and series, such as The Great Gatsby, Burlesque, and Babylon Berlin. The music is performed by the Danish National Symphony Orchestra and DR Big Band under the direction of Miho Hazama. The concert also features the Moka Efti Orchestra, and singers Madame le Pustra, Emma Smith, Mademoiselle Karen, Jakob Munch, and Nikko Weidemann, as well as dancers of Sweet Burlesque. This performance was recorded at the DR Koncerthuset in Copenhagen, Denmark, in May 2023.

programme.title: Céline Dion
programme.sub-title: Celine Dion - Taking Chances World Tour
programme.desc: Part of the world tour of Celine Dion, which was seen by more than 3 million people and covered 5 continents, 25 countries and 92 cities - the first tour in nine years that was an absolute success. Enjoy the biggest hits of the decade's most important artist: "Because You Loved Me", "All By Myself", "My Heart Will Go On", "I Drove All Night" and others!

programme.title: Lana Del Rey
programme.desc: Born to Die is the second album by singer-songwriter Lana Del Rey, and the first to be officially released on January 27, 2012 and that would lead to global success In countries such as the United Kingdom the album was the best selling of that year, that recognition made her a guest of honor in one of the most popular London festivals iTunes Festival, where she would open the awe of all attendees on the night of September 25 2012 at the Roundhouse in the city of London.

programme.title: Women Who Rock
programme.desc: In the '60s, artists such as Grace Slick and Janis Joplin, were fronting A-list bands. Garage rock, all girl bands sprang up across the US in the 1960s and were playing rock 'n' roll on their own terms whilst breaking new ground. As rock developed in the late 1960s and 1970s alongside the women's liberation movement, women refused to be just the pretty singer fronting a group. This episode features bands such as Heart, Suzie Quatro and The Bangles.

programme.title: Pop Rock
programme.desc: New Wave and post-punk were the successors of the raw nihilism of punk. New Wave was brighter, more pop, synth-heavy and very dance-able. The Pop Rock sound of the 1970s & 1980s was a tune heavy blend of punk minimalism, art rock synthesizer and pop melodies. Bands like The Cars, Go-Go's and Huey Lewis & the News embraced the blend of new wave and pop.

programme.title: Various Artists
programme.sub-title: America's Sweethearts: The Queens of Nashville
programme.desc: This documentary chronicles the incredible careers of five country music superstars: TAYLOR SWIFT, FAITH HILL, REBA MC ENTIRE, MIRANDA LAMBERT and CARRIE UNDERWOOD from their unassuming beginnings to the world's largest stages with special antidotes from the artists themselves, friends, family and their influence on other artists.

programme.title: Kylie Minogue
programme.desc: Two hours of classic Kylie, capturing the energy, grandeur and extravagance of the massively acclaimed Aphrodite: Les Folies tour. Filmed at Kylie's triumphant O2 Arena show in London, this concert film was produced using a lavishly hi-tech multi-camera shoot affording the viewer a spectacular experience from start to finish. The 2-hour show proved to be one of the most elaborate and extravagant productions ever staged by a pop performer, a multi-million dollar visual and musical feast, that delighted critics and fans alike wherever it played. Now Kylie's fans can re-live the experience with this amazing 2-hour document, which includes all of her best-known modern hits- "Can t Get You Out Of My Head", "Spinning Around"- as well as her four Billboard Club smashes from 2010's acclaimed "Aphrodite" album including "All The Lovers" and "Get Outta My Way".

programme.title: David Rocco's Dolce Napoli
programme.desc: David becomes a donkey jockey during the Donkey Race, a weekend-long party based around an old Italian tradition at the town of Camposano.

programme.title: David Rocco's Dolce Napoli
programme.desc: David spends a Sunday with S.S.C. Napoli supporters, taking in the sights, sounds and foods at Stadio San Paolo.

programme.title: David Rocco's Dolce Napoli
programme.desc: David meets his friend Gianluca, who invites him to his family's hometown of San Gregorio Armeno, where they celebrate family tradition while drinking, making tomato sauce, and hunting for truffles.

programme.title: David Rocco's Dolce Vita
programme.desc: The Palio di Siena is the most famous horse race in the world. It's certainly the oldest*! It's a centuries-old festival that combines neighbourhood rivalries, pageants and of course, food! David is invited to the Contrada del Bruco — one of the competing districts — where some 1,500 supporters get together for a pre-race dinner. Naturally, David rolls up his sleeves and gets to work in the kitchen.

programme.title: David Rocco's Dolce Vita
programme.desc: David spends time at agriturismo La Selva just outside of Siena, where owner Carlotta Pometti, one of the youngest winemakers in Italy, and her family host guests from all over the world. It's the 4th of July weekend, so David helps out with the cooking to prepare a feast for some of the American guests. The result is an unforgettable Italian-inspired American* spread.

programme.title: David Rocco's Dolce Vita
programme.desc: Florence is the birthplace of gelato, so naturally, that's where David meets up with top gelato maker Vetulio Bondi. Together, they explore the combination of sweet and savoury using ice cream and discover some pretty novel creations. David continues the great gelato experiment at a local bar where he reinvents some classic Italian cocktails like Negroni and Aperol Spritz using ice cream.

programme.title: David Rocco's Dolce Vita
programme.desc: Did you know there's a little India in Florence? Neither did David! He meets up with Eduardo and Selvaggia, two Indophiles living in Firenze — one is the owner of the city's first Indian restaurant, the other founded Florence's Indian film festival — and together they explore Florence's small but vibrant Indian community. And of course, David shares some of his Indo-Italian recipes along the way.

programme.title: David Rocco's Dolce Vita
programme.desc: Southern Tuscany is dotted with small, lesser-known towns that are truly hidden gems. David sets off to the picturesque medieval town of Pitigliano, also known as Little Jerusalem, to meet (and eat!) with the locals and take in the area's beautiful sights.

programme.title: David Rocco's Dolce Vita
programme.desc: Nicola Bertinelli is an entrepreneur in the truest sense of the word. Since taking over his family's dairy farm to produce his own Parmigiano-Reggiano, he's expanded the business to include a store, a coffee bar, a deli, and you won't believe what happens at night … it turns into a full-fledged disco with a poolside bar where thousands of locals come to party! David meets with the man himself to hear his story and make delicious food with this world-famous cheese.

programme.title: David Rocco's Dolce Vita
programme.desc: David's sister runs a North American-style kids' summer camp with a special focus on food in the heart of Tuscany. David decides to pay a visit and spend some time with his kids who are attending the camp this year, and helps prepares some delicious food for the young campers.

programme.title: David Rocco's Dolce Vita
programme.desc: David returns to visit his friend and arguably one of the most famous butchers in the world, Dario Cecchini. This time, though, they're passing on his signature bistecca Fiorentinia and using less appreciated cuts of beef like tendons, cartilage and cows feet. It's part reunion, part carnivore extravaganza, with David cooking up a storm all over Panzano from Dario's restaurant kitchen to an al fresco dinner party at his country home.

programme.title: David Rocco's Dolce Vita
programme.desc: David visits the seaside Tuscan town of Orbetello, where a co-op of fisherman not only fish on the lagoons for eel, seabream and sea bass, but also run the entire smoking and canning operation as well as a seaside restaurant. David learns what it takes to be part of this hardworking crew by spending a morning on the boats with them for the catch of the day, then lending a helping hand in the restaurant kitchen.

programme.sub-title: Junk Yard Dog, Confidence Chamber, Car Carrier Drive-thru
programme.desc: Stunt one is for the dogs as contestants make their way through an urban assault training building and press buttons to raise 6 flags. Along the way, they would have to get past 4 trained attack dogs. Stunt two is a gas as they have to stay inside a room full of CS gas (tear gas). The three contestants to stay in the room the longest would advance to the final. For the final, they start driving a car next to a moving car carrier going 40 mph. When a horn sounded, they would have to drive their car up a ramp and into the back of the car carrier. The contestant to do this the fastest would be the Fear Factor Champion and win $50,000.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.sub-title: Helicopter Slalom, Piercing, Maggoty Cheese, Flag Snag II
programme.desc: This was an extended 4-stunt episode. For the first stunt, contestants have to hang by their ankles from trapeze hanging from a helicopter that flew over 20 flagpoles. The have to release as many flags as possible. In the second stunt, they are strapped down and their left arm would be pierced by 10 needles which would get progressively thicker. In the third, it's eating 4 ounces stinky cheese crawling with maggots. For the final stunt, contestants shimmy out to the end of horizontal pole 10 stories high, grab a flag, and clip it on to a rope hanging overhead. The fastest would win $50,000

programme.title: Matt's Back
programme.desc: Froy and Mike, the new guy, repo a car at a paintball range. When the scene gets out of control, Matt swoops in out of nowhere and saves the day. Then, Sonia and Froy repo a high-end luxury sedan from a snooty pair of Brits in the high-rent district. Finally, Matt and Lou head to a dangerous job with Matt's biggest... and smallest fan.

programme.title: Repo Arigato, Mr. Roboto
programme.desc: Sonia and Carlos put their best performance in when they attempt to repossess a vehicle from a pair of silver-painted robot men.? Matt and Froy need a second opinion when they run into a debtor with a questionable claim about a life-threatening illness.?

programme.title: Rolling Away
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Froy have to push away a debtor while trying to push a classic car up a hill and onto the flatbed. And later, Matt and Froy head out on a repo for a BMW, but when the camera guy refuses to leave the car and Matt's lunch starts to get to him, things go terribly wrong in what could be the worst repo in the history of EGA Recovery.

programme.title: Collectibles
programme.desc: First, Lou, Lyndah, and Matt head to a cul-de-sac to gain possession of a speedboat, and a truck, and a trailer. Later, a rare collectible motorcycle is up for repo, and Matt, Lou, and Froy are ready to collect it. And finally, Froy, Sonia, and Lou nab a forklift from a threat-dealing debtor.

programme.title: The Road to Recovery
programme.desc: On this premiere of Operation Repo's brand new season, Sonia's rehabilitation from her gunshot wound takes a shocking turn. The whole team runs into trouble on a job when they attempt to repossess a carnival ride from a group of wannabe carnies, Froy and Matt wrangle with a gym owner and his hired muscle, and Lou, Froy, and Sonia repo a truck from a protester in quite the revealing outfit.

programme.title: There Was an Accident
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy head to a supermarket to repossess a Mitsubishi from a truant bagboy, but they'll also have to contend with a furious shopper. Then, Matt and Froy find their car, but it's been heavily vandalized and has what looks to be the victim of an attack lying across its front seat. And finally, Lou and Matt have some trouble reclaiming a Ford when its owner starts coming at them with illegal military hardware.

programme.title: Broken Tooth Lou and Bad Breath Frankie
programme.desc: First, Froy and Lyndah probably need to schedule a trip to the dentist after Lou's tooth gets knocked out in the course of a tense confrontation with two irate debtors. Then, Frankie seriously blows a routine voluntary repo when the owner smells something on his breath. With Lou racing to the scene, is this the end of the road for the new guy? Then, Lou's problems get even worse when a rampaging construction crew employs an excavator to demolish the target Camry - with Froy inside of it.

programme.title: Tijuana Surprise
programme.desc: Matt and Froy's business hits another snag when a gang of bat-wielding partiers keeps them away from a car and a paycheck. Then, Lou and Sonia wind up in the crosshairs when they attempt to repo a car from a man who appears to be a federal agent. And, with Matt and Froy's business in a complete shambles, they go to work in the only place that can save them Tijuana.

programme.title: Hayseed Inferno
programme.desc: Sonia pushes the company to repossess more than just cars, and the backlash from the team threatens to end her time in charge before it's even begun.? Ronnie and Matt attempt to repo from a reckless motocross daredevil.

programme.title: Legal Repossession
programme.desc: First, Matt, Froy, and Lou do a legal repossession of an attorney's car. Next, Froy, Lyndah, and Sonia are speechless when they interrupt two girls in the back of a car. And finally, Lou and Sonia wrangle with a bunch of confused ATV owners blindsided by Lou's quick acquisition of their quads.

programme.title: High and Low Spirits
programme.desc: First, Lou and Sonia find themselves in the middle of a baffling marital spat involving a man, his wife, and her untrustworthy yoga instructor. Then, Sonia and Lyndah hit the fashion district to repossess a van from a designer who's way ahead of the curve in terms of the fashion world, but way behind on her payments. And finally, Matt and Froy spoil spirits when they head to a carwash to reclaim a vehicle from a group of vicious, scantily-clad sorority girls.

programme.title: First Class Clown
programme.desc: Matt and Froy are sent on a wild goose chase around L.A for a mini-van, and when they find their debtor selling contraband out of the trunk Matt is further convinced that Lyndah has been scheming against him.

programme.title: Burgers, Bottles, and Hustlers
programme.desc: Lou and Sonia repo a compact sedan from a trio of gun-wielding, bottle-breaking gangsta gals. Then, Matt and Froy get some fast food when they deal with an irate burger-slinger who won't honor Matt's order for his car. Finally, Sonia and Froy come face-to-face with a small time hustler and a gaggle of ladies in his employ.

programme.title: The Creative Zone

programme.title: The Art of Being Human
programme.desc: Beautiful, intimate and ultimately uplifting stories of challenge and humanity -- from making a new home in a strange country, to rebuilding life after unthinkable tragedy. 1) The beauty of human skin in every color | Angélica Dass 2) A day in the Islamic Golden Age | Birte Kristiansen and Petra Sijpesteijn 3) Live drawings of the human experience | Jarrett J. Krosoczka 4) The rebel radio that brought down a war criminal | Diana Sierra Becerra 5) Documentary films that explore trauma -- and make space for healing | Almudena Toral 6) The trans story includes you | Nicole Maines

programme.title: The Business Angle
programme.desc: Insights from the professional world -- from CEOs, entrepreneurs, HR experts, everyday employees and more -- on how to run a successful business and make work life better for everyone. 1) The case for good jobs — and why they're good for business too | Zeynep Ton 2) The crisis of leadership -- and a new way forward | Halla Tómasdóttir and Bryn Freedman 3) Financial inclusion, the digital divide and other thoughts on the future of money | Ajay Banga 4) What nature can teach us about sustainable business | Erin Meezan

programme.title: The Latest in Ideas
programme.desc: New, fresh ideas straight from the brightest minds of our time. 1) How to disagree with respect — not hate | Spencer J. Cox 2) Why is it so dangerous to step on a rusty nail? | Louise Thwaites 3) How (and why) Russia hacked the US election | Laura Galante 4) When will the next mass extinction occur? - Borths, D'Emic, and Pritchard 5) How to end malaria once and for all | Abdoulaye Diabaté 6) Could we build a miniature sun on Earth? | George Zaidan 7) The most dangerous elements on the periodic table | Shannon Odell

programme.title: Laugh and Learn
programme.desc: You won't just laugh out loud -- these speakers will make you think twice. 1) Three ideas. Three contradictions. Or not. | Hannah Gadsby 2) A year in the life of one of Earth's weirdest animals | Gilad Bino 3) Stumbling towards intimacy: An improvised TED Talk | Anthony Veneziale 4) The health benefits of clowning around | Matthew A. Wilson 5) A highly scientific taxonomy of haters | Negin Farsad

programme.title: Best of the Best
programme.desc: Our best, most popular TED content over the years. 1) The tyranny of merit | Michael Sandel 2) Why fascism is so tempting -- and how your data could power it | Yuval Noah Harari 3) What makes something "Kafkaesque"? - Noah Tavlin 4) How to spot a liar | Pamela Meyer

programme.title: Angry Planet | Kenya
programme.desc: Definitely our wildest episode so far. Here's the deal: Mt. Elgon is an 14,000 foot volcano in eastern Kenya. We propose a safari/ascent of the dormant volcano. Here's the first kicker: High on the the flanks of the volcano is Kitum Cave – a cave created by the most unique form of erosion – Elephant Erosion. For millennia elephants have been going into the cave to carve it out with their tusks in order to eat the salty rock. Here's the second kicker: the cave is thought to be the home of the Ebola Marberg virus – the world's most deadly virus. So here's the plan: We are going enter the cave, at night, wearing full Bio-Hazard suits to protect us from the virus.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Indian Monsoon
programme.desc: In June of next year we plan to intercept the Monsoon as it hits southern India and makes its way north along the western shore past Goa and Mumbai up to Delhi.This most famous of torrential rainy seasons drops as much as 40 feet of water on parts of the parched sub-continent.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Iceland
programme.desc: The Land of Ice and Fire – Iceland – is a fascinating and ruggedly demanding country - a perfect subject for exploration by “Angry Planet”. The northern island nation has many of the wild features that we love – volcanoes, glaciers, avalanches, mudslides, big waves, and extreme marine weather. All that – plus weird red and green lights dancing around in the winter sky!

programme.title: Angry Planet | Hurricane Triple Threat
programme.desc: Early September of 2008 saw radical imagery on the hurricane maps of the Atlantic – four named tropical storms, swirling in a train across the ocean. “Angry Planet” was there as three of them made landfall as hurricanes in the US. We filmed gustaf in Louisiana, Hanna in North Carolina, then flew with the USAF Hurricane Hunters into Ike over cuba, and met it again as it made a wild destructive landfall in Galveston, Texas.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Eco-Disasters
programme.desc: No-one creates eco-disasters on quite the scale of the former Soviet Union. In Uzbekistan, the Aral Sea, once one of the largest freshwater lakes in the world, has seen its waters diverted, so that it has shrunk to 1/6 its previous size. In Crimea, a mountain has been carved into a james bondian submarine base. In northern Ukraine, the Chernobyl nuclear site has been reduced to a radioactive wasteland.

programme.title: Sinister Storms | Forces of Nature
programme.desc: Floods, flurries, funnels, and fires all prove to be mighty forces of nature.

programme.title: Sinister Storms | Nature's Fury
programme.desc: Lightning strikes, volcanic eruptions, cyclones, and dust storms unleash nature's raw power on Earth.

programme.title: Sinister Storms | Sky's Wrath
programme.desc: From storm clouds to northern lights, high winds to meteor showers, chaos reigns in the skies.

programme.title: Sinister Storms | Earthquake Horizon
programme.desc: Hailstorms, tidal surges, tornadoes, and earthquakes shake the ground and skies in a catastrophic event.

programme.title: Sinister Storms | Elemental Mayhem
programme.desc: Experience the wrath of the four elements in their most sinister forms.

programme.title: Sinister Storms | Captivating Chaos
programme.desc: A mesmerizing glimpse into the captivating chaos of nature's might.

programme.title: Sinister Storms | Skyward Spectacle
programme.desc: Embark on a journey into the skyward spectacle of the beauty and power of the skies.
